column7: Provide Personal Interview experience. List out the questions asked in personal interaction round.
column8: Provide the list of technical questions asked during the interview (technical subject related)

column6: The role we applied was for Business Development Associate. So mainly they were focused on our communication and negotiation skills. Firstly we had a telephonic interview where they asked us to introduce ourselves. Then we received a mail stating that you are shortlisted, please join the preparatory session. This session lasted for 45 mins where they instructed us what all are the questions that will be asked by the HR and how we are supposed to answer. Basically she shared a calling format with us which consisted of the customer and tele caller roleplay act. We had to practice that and present it to the HR.
column7: We had a virtual interview which lasted for almost 15 to 20 mins. The HR was playing the role of the customer and was testing our skills of negotiation.

1.Introduces yourself. 
2. Why do you wanna take a sales job? 
3. What do you think the required skills are for a Business Development Associate role?
